task: Plan B for /pulse: rename DLD tab to Market, make it default. Rename Binayah Data to Binayah, second tab. Add new DLD-powered features: 12-month transaction volume timeline, avg price/sqft trend chart, property type breakdown, top communities leaderboard with real counts, hottest buildings/projects table.

stages.spec:
Implement Plan B improvements to /pulse page (PulsePageClient.tsx):

TAB RESTRUCTURE:
- Rename Tab 1 from Binayah Data to Binayah (translation key: tabBinayahShort)
- Rename Tab 2 from DLD & Open Data to Market (translation key: tabMarket)
- Make Market the DEFAULT active tab on page load (change useState default from binayah to market — or rename type values to market and binayah)
- Reorder tab buttons so Market appears first

ENRICH MARKET TAB WITH DLD-POWERED FEATURES:
The /api/market-data endpoint already returns transactions data with shape:
- summary: { totalTransactions, totalValue, avgTransactionValue, avgPpsf }
- monthly: [{ year, month, label, count, totalValue, avgPrice, avgPpsf }]
- byArea: top 10 [{ area, count, totalValue, avgPrice, avgPpsf }]
- byType: [{ type, count, totalValue }]

Real data confirmed: 55,131 transactions, AED 200B+ value, 4 months of monthly time series data.

NEW SECTIONS to add to Market tab:
1. Hero stat strip — 4 big numbers from summary: totalTransactions YTD, totalValue (formatted as AED billions), avgTransactionValue (in millions), avgPpsf
2. 12-month transaction volume timeline — bar chart from monthly[] showing count per month, with avgPrice as overlay or tooltip
3. Avg price/sqft trend line — line chart from monthly[] showing avgPpsf over time
4. Top Communities leaderboard — table from byArea[] with: rank, area name, transaction count, total value (AED), avgPrice, avgPpsf. Sortable columns. 10 rows.
5. Hottest Buildings/Projects (optional if data permits) — could surface byArea as is for now since we do not currently expose buildings via the analytics endpoint
KEEP existing Market tab content:
- DLD Transactions section (already there from previous commit) — augment but do not duplicate
- FX Rate Ticker
- Currency Converter
- UAE Economic Indicators
- News Feed

KEEP Binayah tab as-is from previous commit.

DESIGN INTENT:
- Match existing card/section style on the page (do not introduce new color tokens or component patterns)
- Use framer-motion whileInView animations like other sections
- recharts for time series (LineChart + BarChart already used)
- Premium feel — these are the most valuable real numbers on the entire page

I18N CONSTRAINT:
- Zero JSX literals — every user-visible string via t()
- Add new keys to all 4 locale files: messages/en.json, ar.json, zh.json, ru.json (in pulse namespace)
- Use Intl.NumberFormat or AED-specific formatting where amounts shown
- For large numbers prefer compact notation: 200689705768 → AED 200.7B

DATA SAFETY:
- Null-guard every monthly[]/byArea[] access — DLD data could be empty
- If totalTransactions is 0, show empty state with friendly copy explaining DLD pipeline is updating

OUT OF SCOPE:
- Multi-emirate data (DLD only covers Dubai)
- Mortgage vs cash split (analytics filter currently restricts to Sales)
- Backend changes to binayah-api

plannerOutput.note: PM skipped per user request. Spec written directly into stages[0].spec.
